languages.text: Улучшенный имплантационный трон приоткрыл генеторам Сектора Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Благословение Бога-Машины было даровано многим достойным офицерам, священнослужителям и чиновникам флагмана. Священное железо, заменившее их слабую плоть, сделало службу этих людей верной и вечной, пусть и заставляло страдать своих носителей.

The upgraded implantation throne lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.
languages.original_text: Улучшенный имплантационный трон приоткрыл генеторам Сектора Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Священное железо, заменившее их слабую плоть, сделало службу этих людей верной и вечной, пусть и заставляло страдать своих носителей.

traits.locale_text: The upgraded implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

languages.text: ローグトレーダーに与えられた改良型の移植王座は、セクター・ビオニカのジェネターたちにとって、金属の内に生命を保つ秘術の覆いを剥いだ。機械神の祝福は、旗艦に乗り組む多くの値ある士官、聖職者、官吏たちに授けられた。彼らの脆弱なる肉を置き換えた聖なる鉄は、装着者に多大なる苦痛をもたらしながらも、その奉仕を長く忠実なものたらしめたのだった。
languages.original_text: The upgraded implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

traits.locale_text: ローグトレーダーに与えられた植込みの王座は、セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちにとって、金属に永遠に保存された生命のベールを剥がした。しかし、この発見直後、王座は研究者たちと共に、その知らせがアデプタ・メカニクスの耳に届いたことで、炎に包まれた。
ローグトレーダーに与えられた改良型の移植王座は、セクター・ビオニカのジェネターたちにとって、金属の内に生命を保つ秘術の覆いを剥いだ。機械神の祝福は、旗艦に乗り組む多くの値ある士官、聖職者、官吏たちに授けられた。彼らの脆弱なる肉を置き換えた聖なる鉄は、装着者に多大なる苦痛をもたらしながらも、その奉仕を長く忠実なものたらしめたのだった。

languages.text: 升级后的移植王座，为仿生区的基因士们揭开了将生命永驻金属之中的奥秘。旗舰上许多称职的军官、神职人员和政务官都因此获得了万机之神的祝福。取代孱弱血肉的圣铁，虽然给承载者带来了巨大的痛苦，却也使他们能够长久而忠诚地继续服役。
languages.original_text: The upgraded implantation throne lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

traits.locale_text: 升级后的移植王座，为仿生区的基因士们揭开了将生命永驻金属之中的奥秘。旗舰上许多称职的军官、神职人员和政务官都因此获得了万机之神的祝福。取代孱弱血肉的圣铁，虽然给承载者带来了巨大的痛苦，却也使他们能够长久而忠诚地继续服役。

languages.text: Le fauteuil d'implantation amélioré révéla aux genetors du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver la vie dans le métal. La bénédiction du Dieu-Machine fut accordée à de nombreux officiers, clercs et autres fonctionnaires de valeur à bord du vaisseau amiral. Le fer sacré qui s'était substitué à leurs chairs fragiles leur permit de continuer à servir longtemps et fidèlement, malgré les terribles souffrances qu'il infligeait à ses hôtes.
languages.original_text: The upgraded implantation throne lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

Le fauteuil d'implantation offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} révéla aux genetors du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver la vie dans le métal. La bénédiction du Dieu-Machine fut accordée à de nombreux officiers, clercs et autres fonctionnaires de valeur à bord du vaisseau amiral. Le fer sacré qui s'était substitué à leurs chairs fragiles leur permit de continuer à servir longtemps et fidèlement, malgré les terribles souffrances qu'il infligeait à ses hôtes.

languages.text: El trono de implantación mejorado reveló a los genetores del Sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación de la vida en el metal. Muchos oficiales, clérigos y funcionarios a bordo de la nave insignia recibieron la bendición del Dios Máquina. El hierro sagrado que reemplazó su débil carne aseguró que su servicio fuera largo y verdadero, a pesar del gran sufrimiento que padecían sus portadores.
languages.original_text: The upgraded implantation throne lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

El trono de implantación mejorado d{mf|el|e la} Comerciante Independiente reveló a los genetores del Sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación de la vida en el metal. Muchos oficiales, clérigos y funcionarios a bordo de la nave insignia recibieron la bendición del Dios Máquina. El hierro sagrado que reemplazó su débil carne aseguró que su servicio fuera largo y verdadero, a pesar del gran sufrimiento que padecían sus portadores.

languages.text: Geliştirilmiş implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika'nın Genetörleri için yaşamın metal içinde korunmasının üzerindeki örtüyü kaldırdı. Makine Tanrı'nın lütfu; sancak gemisindeki birçok değerli subaya, ruhbana ve işyara bahşedildi. Zayıf etlerinin yerini alan kutsal demir, taşıyıcılarına büyük acılar çektirmesine rağmen hizmetlerinin uzun ve sadık olmasını sağladı.
languages.original_text: The upgraded implantation throne lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

traits.locale_text: Geliştirilmiş implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika'nın Genetörleri için yaşamın metal içinde korunmasının üzerindeki örtüyü kaldırdı. Makine Tanrı'nın lütfu; sancak gemisindeki birçok değerli subaya, ruhbana ve işyara bahşedildi. Zayıf etlerinin yerini alan kutsal demir, taşıyıcılarına büyük acılar çektirmesine rağmen hizmetlerinin uzun ve sadık olmasını sağladı.

Hür Tacir'e verilen geliştirilmiş implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika'nın Genetörleri için yaşamın metal içinde korunmasının üzerindeki örtüyü kaldırdı. Makine Tanrı'nın lütfu; sancak gemisindeki birçok değerli subaya, ruhbana ve işyara bahşedildi. Zayıf etlerinin yerini alan kutsal demir, taşıyıcılarına büyük acılar çektirmesine rağmen hizmetlerinin uzun ve sadık olmasını sağladı.

languages.text: Der verbesserte Implantationsthron lüftete für die Genetoren im Sektor Bionica den Schleier über der Erhaltung des Lebens in Metall. Der Segen des Maschinengottes wurde vielen würdigen Offizieren, Klerikern und Funktionären an Bord des Flaggschiffs gewährt. Das heilige Eisen, das ihr schwaches Fleisch ersetzte, sorgte dafür, dass ihr Dienst lang und wahrhaftig war, obwohl es seinen Trägern großes Leid zufügte.

Der Segen des Maschinengottes wurde vielen würdigen Offizieren, Klerikern und Funktionären an Bord des Flaggschiffs gewährt. Das heilige Eisen, das ihr schwaches Fleisch ersetzte, sorgte dafür, dass ihr Dienst lang und wahrhaftig war, obwohl es seinen Trägern großes Leid zufügte.

Der {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} gewährte Implantationsthron lüftete für die Genetoren im Sektor Bionica den Schleier über der Erhaltung des Lebens in Metall. Der Segen des Maschinengottes wurde vielen würdigen Offizieren, Klerikern und Funktionären an Bord des Flaggschiffs gewährt. Das heilige Eisen, das ihr schwaches Fleisch ersetzte, sorgte dafür, dass ihr Dienst lang und wahrhaftig war, obwohl es seinen Trägern großes Leid zufügte.
